name: Apple and Honey Scones
recipeIngredient: 1 large tart apple, peeled and chopped
recipeInstructions: In a large bowl, combine flour, wheat germ, baking powder, cinnamon, baking soda, salt, and nutmeg. Cut in the butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Combine the apple, milk, and honey; add to dry ingredients just until moistened. Turn onto a floured surface and gently knead 5-6 times. Gently press dough into an 9-inch circle, about 1/2 inch thick. Sprinkle topping over the dough. Cut into eight wedges and place on a greased baking sheet. Bake at 400°F for 15-18 minutes.
